channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Brompton Electric T-Line Folding Electric Bicycle Review: Pocket-Sized Pedal Power
item.description: Brompton's latest folding electric bicycle is beautiful, genuinely portable, and doesn't quite go fast enough.

item.title: This At-Home Hair Growth System Just Dropped in Price
item.description: Our favorite red light therapy device for hair growth just dropped in price. Grab it while it lasts.

item.title: The $100,000 fee for H-1Bs is causing all sorts of problems
item.description: Last fall, President Donald Trump's executive order raising the fee for H-1B visas to $100,000 - like many of his immigration policies - led to near-immediate chaos. Thousands of workers who had flown overseas to renew their visas ended up stranded abroad. Details about who would be affected only emerged after the fact. Six months […]

item.title: How to watch Leicester Tigers vs Exeter Chiefs: live stream the PREM Rugby Cup final 2025/26, TV channels
item.description: Here are all the ways to watch the PREM Rugby Cup final 2025/26 from anywhere in the world, and it's Leicester Tigers vs Exeter Chiefs clashing for the trophy.

item.title: Android plus rapide, Nvidia écrase AMD, mise à jour Google Maps et nouveautés Xbox – Le Récap Frandroid
item.description: Le projet pour rendre Android plus rapide, AMD qui souffre face à Nvidia, la mise à jour de Google Maps ou les annonces Xbox. Il s'est passé plein de choses dans la tech pendant la semaine. Voici le récap.

item.title: I admire Logitech’s attempt to revolutionize the gaming mouse — but I’m not quite sold on its haptics just yet
item.description: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike features unique mouse buttons with adjustable haptics — but are they suitable for every gamer?

item.title: 'Ready in 5, full in 9' — this Chinese EV charges to 70% in only 5 minutes, has a 644-mile range, and it's coming to Europe in April
item.description: BYD says it will introduce 1.5 Megawatt charging to Europe with the introduction of its high-performance Z9 GT model

item.title: Ventes Flash de Printemps : Amazon brade l’abonnement 1 an à Adobe Creative Cloud Pro pour étudiants et enseignants
item.description: Adobe Creative Cloud Pro est un abonnement en ligne permettant d'utiliser plus de 20 applications comme Photoshop, Illustrator ou encore Premiere Pro pour ne citer qu'elles. Tout ça pour 161,32 euros l'année, au lieu de 232,84 euros.

item.title: iGarden M1 Pro Max 100 Review: A Sports Car for Your Pool
item.description: iGarden's new pool-cleaning robot pairs sporty design with a long runtime, though there are a few quirks.

item.title: The latest iPhone Fold leaks suggest mass production is getting closer — and Apple may have almost solved the visible crease problem
item.description: We've got more leaks around the foldable iPhone, and it seems everything is set for September 2026.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs aspirateurs balais laveurs en 2026 ?
item.description: Les aspirateurs-balais laveurs combinent aspiration et lavage à l'eau des sols - parfois appuyé par de la vapeur ou du détergent. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles d'aspirateurs-balais laveurs.

item.title: Razer Boomslang 20th Anniversary Mouse Review: For Collectors
item.description: Despite a price tag that’s a literal joke, this is still a cool collector’s item for gaming nerds.

item.title: I’m a cybersecurity professional, here’s why I’m preparing for an AI data breach
item.description: AI companies host a treasure trove of data - third-party data breaches pose major risk.

item.title: Nvidia's major update to Multi Frame Generation is almost here — but rival Intel's MFG still has one significant advantage
item.description: Nvidia's new MFG is coming, but I still think Intel's equivalent has a hardware advantage.

item.title: Eighty Years Later, the Chemex Still Makes Better Coffee
item.description: The iconic hourglass pour-over brewer proves great design never goes out of style.

item.title: The revolution will be monetized
item.description: Realities of war: SEA tech players brace for impact as oil supplies fall and prices surge while geopolitical risk enters the Gulf’s data center scene.
